introSection: Road Runner Express is an Arrow Dynamics roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA. Opened on May 1, 1997, it was the last mine train coaster to be built by Arrow Dynamics at a Six Flags amusement park. The ride's track and supports were engineered by Ride Centerline.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The ride's height requirement was raised from to  in 2025.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: 2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 36 riders per train.

fullText:
Road Runner Express is an Arrow Dynamics roller coaster located at Six Flags Fiesta Texas in San Antonio, Texas, USA. Opened on May 1, 1997, it was the last mine train coaster to be built by Arrow Dynamics at a Six Flags amusement park. The ride's track and supports were engineered by Ride Centerline.

The ride's height requirement was raised from to  in 2025.



2 trains with 6 cars per train. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 36 riders per train.
